content:
Downtown Train - Rod Stewart
Capo: 3

[Intro]
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]   
  Outside another yellow moon[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Has punched a hole in the nighttime[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   
  I climb through the window and down to the street[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I'm shining like a new dime[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]              
   The downtown trains are full[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]       
   Full of all them Brooklyn girls[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
   They try so hard to break out of their little world[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   
  You wave your hand and they scatter like crows[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                           [ch]D[/ch]
They have nothing that'll ever capture your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]            
  They're just thorns without the rose[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          
  Be careful of them in the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
  Oh if I was the one you chose to be your only one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]
  Oh baby can't you hear me now,  can't you hear me now[/tab]


[Refrain] 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
  Will I see you tonight    on a downtown train[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]

They stay at the carnival[/tab]
